# 工程需求解析.md

## ER-001 — 支持多模态剧本生成（文本+分镜+角色设定）
- `er_id`: ER-001
- `name`: 多模态剧本协同生成能力
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §3.1.2", "REQ-001 (需求结构拆解.md)"]
- `requirement_statement`: 系统必须支持基于用户输入的剧情梗概，同步生成结构化剧本文本、分镜序列（含镜头类型/时长/运镜描述）、角色设定卡（含外貌/性格/关系图谱）三类输出，并保证跨模态语义一致性。
- `technical_aspects`: [data_storage, concurrency, idempotency, observability]
- `implied_needs`: ["soft-delete policy for draft generations", "UTC timezone enforcement in timestamped versioning", "idempotency key derived from input hash + user context", "distributed tracing across LLM orchestration and asset rendering pipelines", "SLO: p95 generation latency < 8s"]
- `er_tier`: t1_capability
- `recognized_patterns`: ["saga_orchestration", "outbox_event_relay"]
- `tech_stack_binding`: abstract
- `actors`: ["content_creator", "ai_director_agent"]
- `objects`: ["script_draft", "storyboard_sequence", "character_profile"]
- `triggers`: ["user_submit_story_prompt", "auto_regenerate_on_edit"]
- `acceptance`: ["所有三类输出在单次请求中完成并原子返回", "任意模态修改后可触发局部重生成而不影响其余模态状态"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["performance: p95 < 8s", "reliability: at-least-once delivery of generation events"]
- `dependencies`: ["LLM inference gateway", "vector store for prompt history", "scene graph ontology service"]
- `risks`: ["cross-modal hallucination risk without shared latent alignment", "version skew between generated assets during partial update"]
- `open_questions`: ["是否允许 inter-modality references (e.g., 'see Character-A from Scene-3')? If yes, resolution strategy needed."]
- `emitted_api_candidates`: [{"api_id": "API-GEN-001", "name": "POST /v1/scripts/generate", "intent": "orchestrate multi-modal script synthesis"}]
- `confidence`: explicit

## ER-002 — 支持本地化配音与唇形同步（Lip-sync）
- `er_id`: ER-002
- `name`: 多语言唇形驱动配音合成
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §4.2.5", "pending: no upstream OBJ-ID mapping"]
- `requirement_statement`: 系统必须为生成的动画片段提供指定目标语言的语音合成，并自动驱动角色口型与语音波形对齐；支持至少中/日/英/韩四语种，且唇形动作符合该语言音素-可视发音单元（viseme）映射规则。
- `technical_aspects`: [external_integration, caching, performance, compliance]
- `implied_needs`: ["circuit-breaker on TTS provider API", "cache TTL aligned with voice model versioning", "SLO: lip-sync error < 40ms RMS deviation", "PII masking in audio metadata if user uploads custom voice samples"]
- `er_tier`: t1_capability
- `recognized_patterns`: ["circuit_breaker", "idempotent_consumer"]
- `tech_stack_binding`: abstract
- `actors`: ["voice_designer", "localization_engine"]
- `objects`: ["audio_track", "lip_animation_clip"]
- `triggers`: ["user_select_target_language_and_voice", "auto_sync_on_audio_import"]
- `acceptance`: ["measured lip-sync deviation ≤ 40ms RMS per frame", "fallback to silent mouth animation when sync fails"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["performance: sync_accuracy_rms < 40ms", "compliance: PII_masking_if_custom_voice_used"]
- `dependencies`: ["TTS provider integration (e.g., Azure Neural TTS)", "viseme mapping database", "animation rig binding layer"]
- `risks`: ["viseme mapping incompleteness for rare phonemes in Korean dialects"]
- `open_questions`: ["Which viseme standard is adopted (e.g., MPEG-4 FBA, Apple ARKit, or custom)? Required for rig binding."]
- `emitted_api_candidates`: [{"api_id": "API-AUDIO-002", "name": "POST /v1/audio/sync", "intent": "trigger lip-sync alignment pipeline"}]
- `confidence`: pending

## ER-003 — 剧本版本控制与协作历史追溯
- `er_id`: ER-003
- `name`: 剧本全生命周期版本审计
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §5.3.1", "RULE-022 (业务规则清单.md)", "SM-014 (状态转移图.md)"]
- `requirement_statement`: 系统必须为每个剧本实体维护不可变、时间戳有序、带操作者签名的版本链；支持按时间/作者/变更类型（add/edit/delete）检索历史快照，并提供差异可视化（diff view）。
- `technical_aspects`: [data_storage, audit, authorization, concurrency]
- `implied_needs`: ["append-only storage backend (e.g., immutable log or ledger table)", "A01-A10 audit category tagging per edit event", "RBAC-enforced read access to historical versions", "optimistic locking on concurrent edits"]
- `er_tier`: t1_capability
- `recognized_patterns`: ["four_eyes_approval", "optimistic_locking"]
- `tech_stack_binding`: abstract
- `actors`: ["script_editor", "production_manager", "legal_reviewer"]
- `objects`: ["script_version", "edit_event_log"]
- `triggers`: ["save_draft", "publish_version", "rollback_to_version"]
- `acceptance`: ["all versions are cryptographically signed by actor identity", "diff view shows line-level additions/deletions with author attribution"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["audit: append_only=true", "security: tamper_evident_log=true"]
- `dependencies`: ["identity provider (OIDC/SAML)", "versioned object store"]
- `risks`: ["high storage growth without retention policy"]
- `open_questions`: ["Retention period for draft versions? Legal requirement for script IP archival?"]
- `emitted_api_candidates`: [{"api_id": "API-VER-003", "name": "GET /v1/scripts/{id}/versions", "intent": "retrieve auditable version chain"}]
- `confidence`: explicit

## ER-005 — 场景资产智能推荐（基于风格/情绪/节奏）
- `er_id`: ER-005
- `name`: 情绪-节奏感知场景匹配
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §6.2.3", "inferred from OBJ-047 (数据对象目录.md): 'scene_asset' has tags [mood, tempo, visual_style]"]
- `requirement_statement`: 系统必须根据当前剧本段落的情绪标签（e.g., 'melancholy', 'tense'）和节奏标记（e.g., 'slow_pace', 'staccato')，从资产库中实时推荐匹配度≥85%的背景、道具、灯光预设组合，并支持一键应用。
- `technical_aspects`: [caching, messaging, observability, performance]
- `implied_needs`: ["cache invalidation on asset tag update", "DLQ for failed recommendation jobs", "metrics: recommendation_latency_p95 < 1.2s", "alert on sustained match_score_drift > 5%"]
- `er_tier`: t1_capability
- `recognized_patterns`: ["caching", "messaging"]
- `tech_stack_binding`: abstract
- `actors`: ["scene_designer", "ai_curator_agent"]
- `objects`: ["scene_asset_bundle", "script_segment"]
- `triggers`: ["cursor_enter_script_segment", "change_mood_tag_in_editor"]
- `acceptance`: ["recommendations appear within 1.2s of trigger", "match score is explainable via top-3 contributing tags"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["performance: p95_latency < 1.2s", "observability: match_score_explainability=true"]
- `dependencies`: ["tagged asset catalog", "embedding service for semantic similarity"]
- `risks`: ["cold-start for new tag combinations"]
- `open_questions`: ["Is match_score threshold (85%) configurable per project? If yes, where is it governed?"]
- `emitted_api_candidates`: [{"api_id": "API-REC-005", "name": "POST /v1/recommendations/scene", "intent": "fetch style-aware scene bundles"}]
- `confidence`: inferred

## ER-006 — 导出为行业标准格式（AEP/FCPX/EDL）
- `er_id`: ER-006
- `name`: 多平台剪辑工程导出兼容性
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §7.4.1", "no matching OBJ-ID found in 数据对象目录.md"]
- `requirement_statement`: 系统必须支持将最终成片时间线导出为 Adobe Premiere Pro (AEP), Final Cut Pro X (FCPX), 和 Edit Decision List (EDL) 格式，保留轨道结构、转场、字幕层及元数据（如场景ID、角色名）。
- `technical_aspects`: [external_integration, data_storage, compliance]
- `implied_needs`: ["retry logic on export timeout (>90s)", "export job idempotency to prevent duplicate file writes", "retention policy for exported artifacts (min 90 days)", "data residency: exported files must remain in APAC region"]
- `er_tier`: t1_capability
- `recognized_patterns`: ["external_integration", "idempotent_consumer"]
- `tech_stack_binding`: abstract
- `actors`: ["editor", "dtp_operator"]
- `objects`: ["export_job", "timeline_export_package"]
- `triggers`: ["user_click_export_button", "scheduled_daily_export"]
- `acceptance`: ["AEP export opens in Premiere without missing clips or broken links", "EDL contains correct timecode mapping and reel names"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["compliance: data_residency=APAC", "reliability: export_success_rate ≥ 99.95%"]
- `dependencies`: ["timeline serialization engine", "format-specific schema mappers"]
- `risks`: ["FCPX XML schema drift across macOS versions"]
- `open_questions`: ["Which FCPX XML version is targeted (v1.10 vs v1.12)? Required for schema validation."]
- `emitted_api_candidates`: [{"api_id": "API-EXP-006", "name": "POST /v1/export/timeline", "intent": "initiate cross-platform timeline export"}]
- `confidence`: pending

## ER-007 — 用户角色分级与权限隔离（制片人/导演/编剧/美术）
- `er_id`: ER-007
- `name`: 四级角色权限模型
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §2.5.2", "PERM-001–PERM-012 (权限矩阵.md)"]
- `requirement_statement`: 系统必须实施基于角色的访问控制（RBAC），定义制片人（full control）、导演（edit script & storyboard, approve assets）、编剧（edit script only）、美术（upload/modify assets only）四类角色；权限粒度须覆盖对象级（剧本/场景/角色）和操作级（view/edit/publish/delete）。
- `technical_aspects`: [authorization, audit, security]
- `implied_needs`: ["SoD enforcement: no user may hold both 'publish' and 'delete' permissions on same object", "PoLP: default deny, explicit grant only", "audit trail for all permission grants/revocations"]
- `er_tier`: t1_capability
- `recognized_patterns`: ["four_eyes_approval", "RBAC"]
- `tech_stack_binding`: abstract
- `actors`: ["producer", "director", "screenwriter", "art_director"]
- `objects`: ["script", "storyboard", "asset_library"]
- `triggers`: ["role_assignment", "object_access_attempt"]
- `acceptance`: ["attempting 'publish' as screenwriter returns 403", "all role changes logged with approver ID and timestamp"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["security: SoD_compliant=true", "audit: permission_change_log=true"]
- `dependencies`: ["identity provider", "policy decision point (PDP)"]
- `risks`: ["role explosion if ad-hoc teams require custom combos"]
- `open_questions`: ["How are hybrid roles (e.g., writer-director) handled? Is role composition supported?"]
- `emitted_api_candidates`: [{"api_id": "API-AUTHZ-007", "name": "GET /v1/permissions/check", "intent": "runtime RBAC evaluation"}]
- `confidence`: explicit

## ER-009 — 实时协作编辑冲突检测与合并提示
- `er_id`: ER-009
- `name`: 多人协同编辑冲突管理
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §5.2.4", "inferred from SM-008 (状态转移图.md): 'editing_state' supports concurrent transitions"]

- `triggers`: ["simultaneous_field_update", "presence_ping_timeout"]
- `acceptance`: ["conflict UI shows side-by-side diff with author avatars", "merge action emits normalized delta event"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["reliability: zero_lost_edits", "observability: conflict_rate_per_hour"]
- `dependencies`: ["realtime presence service", "delta encoding library"]
- `risks`: ["UI lag under high-conflict density"]

## ER-011 — AI生成内容水印与版权归属声明嵌入
- `er_id`: ER-011
- `name`: 生成内容版权元数据嵌入
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §8.1.3", "no matching RULE-ID in 业务规则清单.md"]

- `risks`: ["watermark false positives in high-noise scenes"]

## ER-015 — 智能分镜补全（基于上下文预测缺失镜头）
- `er_id`: ER-015
- `name`: 上下文感知分镜插值
- `source_requirements`: ["PRD_v0.4 §6.2.1", "inferred from SM-021 (状态转移图.md): 'panel_gap_detected' state triggers interpolation"]
- `requirement_statement`: 当检测到分镜序列中存在逻辑断点（e.g., character enters room → next panel shows character exiting same room, skipping interior action），系统必须自动生成1–3个中间分镜，保持角色动线、场景连贯性与镜头语法合理性。
- `technical_aspects`: [idempotency, observability, concurrency]
- `implied_needs`: ["idempotency key includes gap_span_hash + narrative_context_vector", "metrics: interpolation_acceptance_rate > 75%", "deadlock analysis for recursive gap detection"]
- `er_tier`: t2_pattern
- `recognized_patterns`: ["saga_orchestration"]
- `tech_stack_binding`: abstract
- `actors`: ["ai_director_agent", "narrative_analyzer"]
- `objects`: ["storyboard_sequence", "gap_interpolation_candidate"]
- `triggers`: ["panel_gap_detected", "user_request_interpolate"]
- `acceptance`: ["interpolated panels maintain consistent character design IDs", "narrative coherence score ≥ 0.82 (BERTScore)"]
- `nfr_flags`: ["performance: interpolation_p95 < 5s", "reliability: no infinite recursion"]
- `dependencies`: ["narrative graph service", "character design registry"]
- `risks`: ["over-interpolation leading to pacing bloat"]
- `open_questions`: ["What is the maximum allowed gap span (in seconds or panels) before interpolation is disabled?"]
- `emitted_api_candidates`: [{"api_id": "API-INTP-015", "name": "POST /v1/storyboard/interpolate", "intent": "insert narratively coherent panels"}]
- `confidence`: inferred

- `technical_aspects`: [caching, observability, compliance, security]
